name: Sauce for Barbeque Chicken
recipeInstructions:
Although here in Eastern N.C., tomato-based barbecue sauce is next to heresy, I have used this recipe for barbecue chicken for many years. It only takes 5 minutes to cook. Combine ingredients in a saucepan. Cook and stir occasionally over low heat for 5 minutes.
Place chicken pieces in a large pan and bake in a 350-degree oven for 30 minutes without the sauce. Then pour the sauce over the chicken and cook an additional 30 minutes, basting often. Be sure to check every five minutes during the last 15 minutes of cooking to prevent burning.
